name: astral-anchor
summary: A fixed point in the silver void of the Astral Plane. A platform of starlight-stone, ringed by portal-stelae, where travelers regain their bearings between journeys. Everything drifts slightly.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: roughly square or circular — the anchor is a disc in the void

accent.purpose: sigil-inlay or anchor-glyph at the platform center

primary_palette.note: the mooring stone with portals in a ring
a cluster of cord-moorings for planar travelers

story_prompts: a githyanki raiding party stages here before a material-plane strike
a dead god's finger has drifted into the anchor's field and is tangling cords
two rival planar guilds are negotiating mooring rights at the central stone
empty, eerily quiet — a single silver cord dangles, its traveler overdue
a mind flayer nautiloid has moored and is discharging passengers

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: medium (0.4-0.55) with silver-violet ambient; portals glow

anti_patterns: surround the platform with invisible walls (iw) — the void is the wall
no ground outside the platform — the platform IS the room
avoid warm colors; palette is silver, violet, pale blue, starlight
props can and should float slightly off the floor — drift is expected
